locations.name: 哥伦比亚
locations.summary: 哥伦比亚共和国（西班牙語：República de Colombia），通稱哥倫比亞（西班牙語：Colombia），是一個位於南美洲西北部的国家，同時是拉丁美洲第四大國家，為南美洲國家聯盟的前成員國（2018年8月退出）。它的北部是加勒比…

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

locations.name: 秘鲁
locations.summary: 秘（bì）魯共和國（西班牙語：República del Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw Ripuwlika；艾馬拉語：Piruwxa Ripuwlika），通称秘魯（西班牙語：Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw；艾馬拉語：Piruw），是南…

locations.name: Várzea forest
locations.summary: A várzea forest is a seasonal floodplain forest inundated by whitewater rivers that occurs in the Amazon biome.

relations.subject: Orange-eyed flatbill
relations.evidence: Parker III|Parker]], 1997 | synonyms = | range_map = Tolmomyias traylori map.svg }} The orange-eyed flatbill or orange-eyed flycatcher (Tolmomyias traylori) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Orange-eyed flatbill
relations.evidence: The species inhabits riverside forest, especially seasonally flooded várzea

relations.subject: Orange-eyed flatbill
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered rare and local in Colombia and Ecuador and "poorly known" in Peru. "Human activity has little short-term direct effect on the Orange-eyed Flatbill, other than the local effects of habitat destruction."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
